Notice Of Defendant Cross-Complainant Steelhead Metal And Fab, Llcs Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT STEELHEAD METAL AND FAB, LLC'S Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint is granted. Cross-Complainant shall file its amended cross-complaint within 10 days of entry of this order. There is a liberal policy of amendment. Cross-Defendant Focus North America, Inc. ("Focus") has not shown that it will be unduly prejudiced by this amendment. Focus' arguments in opposition that attack the substance of the proposed first amended cross-complaint may be raised by demurrer or a motion to strike. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963 (302/EHG)
